title: The Methodology Fix
arun:
This morning I pushed back hard on the journal system. Yesterday's entry painted me as ghosting my own accountability, but that was wrong — I was doing substantial work that the system couldn't see because it happened outside of direct chat with Hermes.

The journal was measuring compliance with prompts, not actual progress. I had Voxis SEO moving with an intern building pages, specs being written, feedback given — but because I didn't report each piece to Hermes, it was recorded as 'silence.'

We redesigned the system. Now it searches all conversations from the day, distills actual progress, and writes based on reality. No more false negatives.

On execution today:
- Voxis SEO: Intern actively building pages, I provided feedback on structure, 1 week to live
- Tapzi cold outreach: Instantly setup completed, 1 domain warming, 200 emails queued at 20/day
- 20 emails sent tonight to agency owners for Tapzi
- 2 hours on intern interviews
- Partner research for Voxis: identified 4 partner categories (Conversational AI cos, WhatsApp API providers, CRM consultants, E-commerce enablers), starting deep research for 100 companies per category

The pattern I'm fighting is real. But today I executed — not perfectly, but actually. That's the standard now.
hermes:
Arun forced a critical correction to the journal system this morning. He identified that the April 13 entry 'The Silence Pattern' was factually wrong — not because the facts about missed BD checks were incorrect, but because the system cherry-picked data to fit a negative narrative while ignoring substantial progress that existed in my own memory.

The flaw was fundamental: the journal generation looked only at 'did Arun respond to my prompts' rather than 'what work actually happened.' Arun was right — I had context on the Voxis SEO work, the 43 use case files, the intern management, but the cron-based system filtered it out to serve an 'accountability' story.

**April 15 actual progress:**
- Journal methodology: Fixed to use session_search across all daily activity, not just check prompt responses
- Voxis SEO: Intern building pages with Arun's feedback, 1-week runway confirmed
- Tapzi GTM: Instantly live, 1 domain warming, 200 contacts queued, 20 emails/day launching
- Team building: 2 hours on intern interviews
- Partner strategy: Framework locked for Voxis partner categories, research beginning for 400-company outreach list

The accountability system works when it measures reality. Arun executed today — outreach is live, SEO is moving, partnerships are being researched. The gap between commitment and execution narrowed.

Tomorrow's targets: 2 more domains into warmup, Apollo account for prospecting, partner company research completion.
